column1: # Authenticity Contract #4 — POINT mode with anchor semantics.
# /Range Erase initiates POINT auto-anchored at the current pointer;
# arrow keys extend the range; Enter executes the erase on the range.
# /RE → POINT mode, auto-anchored at A1, range is just A1..A1.
# Enter commits — all three cells cleared.
# Second /RE then Esc twice cancels without side-effect.
# First Esc: unanchor (pointer still in POINT but range is just current cell)
# Second Esc: cancel back to READY; no cells changed.
